rulings.Case Title: JUAN ROMAN VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 4, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANTS PNMAC MORTGAGE OPPORTUNITY FUND INVESTORS, LLC and MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss DENIED. PNMAC was instructed to prepare an order Re: Demurrer to First Amended Complaint. (See 3/13/2013 Tentative Ruling). No Order submitted to the Court/executed by the Court. CCP 472b; Rutter Guide: Civil Procedure Before Trail §7:135. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA LIDIA MEDRANO DE LARA et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Bank Of America And Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 4, 2013, line 3. Defendants Bank Of America And Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s Demurrer To Complaint OVERRULED in part and SUSTAINED in part. Demurrer is SUSTAINED with LEAVE TO AMEND in good faith 14th cause of action for violation of Security First Rule; 15th cause of action to allege tender and to verify complaint; SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to 7th cause of action for violation of Rosenthal Act. See Franczak v. Suntrust Mortgage 2013 WL 843912; OVERRULED as to all other causes of action, sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RINA BELLO VS. JAVIER TENORIO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Unlawful Detainer Summons Served With Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 4, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT SALAZAR, HARVEY, SUED AS HARVEY SALAZAR AKA HARVEY's Motion To Quash Service Of Unlawful Detainer Summons Served With Second Amended Complaint DENIED as to the service of Summons. Hershenson is on point. See Rutter Guide: Landlord-Tenant. Defendant failed to show that he was mislead or prejudiced. Delta Motion to Quash is GRANTED with leave to amend - Lease attached to SAC appears to be incomplete and there is no explanation offered. Whether Marietta Tenorio was a party to the Lease is a question of fact; and Defendant cites not authority for the proposition that failure to allege attempts of service of Notice at place of business is fatal for unlawful detainer cause of action. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. = (501/REQ)
